title: Applications of Normal Distribution
description: Apply normal distribution to real-world problems.

lessons.title: Given X, Find Probability
lessons.content:
## Given X, Find Probability

Standardize and use Z-table.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Given Probability, Find X
lessons.content:
## Given Probability, Find X

Use inverse Z and x = μ + zσ.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Percentile Problems
lessons.content:
## Percentile Problems

- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

lessons.title: Real-World Applications
